Fund Name: HDFC Focused Fund Direct Growth.
The current NAV is 254.865. The Assets Under Management (AUM) is 24169.507. The Expense Ratio is 0.68%. The Exit Load is: Exit load of 1% if redeemed within 1 year. The minimum SIP amount is ₹100. The risk level is rated as Very High. The benchmark index is NIFTY 500 Total Return Index. The fund manager is Vinay Kulkarni. Top holdings include: ICICI Bank Ltd. (9.33%), HDFC Bank Ltd. (8.63%), Axis Bank Ltd. (7.21%), State Bank of India (5.72%), Kotak Mahindra Bank Ltd. (5.52%).
